predicate.title: Per-date sequence in Change Record ids; record context-purge policy (D14, D15)
predicate.problem: Owner cannot tell from a Change Record id which same-date record came first (eight CR-20260714-* records, no ordinal). Separately, the first dashboard read showed lead/cycle time climbing with accumulated agent session context; the owner directed a purge-after-every-change policy that was enacted in the agent harness but not yet recorded in the framework's knowledge.
acceptance_criteria: changeId schema accepts CR-<yyyymmdd>-<seq>-<slug> with a 3-digit per-date sequence; legacy ids stay valid (grandfathered, never renamed)
Dashboard, CLI, and JSON metrics number every merged change in merge order so legacy same-day records are orderable too
D14 (per-date sequence) and D15 (context purged between changes) exist as decision nodes; decisions.md, PURPOSE.md, LEFTOVERS.md regenerate without drift
This change is itself the first record opened under the new scheme, with clock timestamps
